name: Knockouts Begin: Canada Reach the Last 16 for the First Time
angle: The knockout stage is under way and the opening Round of 32 tie produced history: Canada beat South Africa 1-0 with a stoppage-time winner to reach the World Cup last 16 for the first time ever, with the heavyweight ties Brazil v Japan, Germany v Paraguay and Netherlands v Morocco to come.

questions.question: Canada have reached the knockouts as one of three host nations. Who are the other two co-hosts of the 2026 World Cup?
As the knockout rounds get going, who are the reigning world champions chasing back-to-back titles?
This is the first World Cup to stage a Round of 32, a consequence of the field expanding to how many teams?
Canada beat South Africa 1-0 in the opening Round of 32 tie. Who struck deep in stoppage time to win it?
Canada's captain made his tournament debut off the bench against South Africa, having sat out the group stage with a hamstring injury. Who is he?
Which American head coach guided Canada to that historic knockout win, the first manager to win a knockout match at this tournament?
Canada now go to the last 16 for the first time in their history. They will face the winner of which Round of 32 tie?
Alongside the twelve group winners and twelve runners-up, how many of the best third-placed teams advanced to fill the Round of 32?
Canada's win over South Africa, the tie that opened the last 32, was staged at which Los Angeles-area stadium?
Canada's only previous World Cup goals came in 2022. Against which nation did they score their first-ever World Cup goal?
Who scored that first-ever World Cup goal for Canada, a header in the opening minutes against Croatia in 2022?
Before this run, Canada had played at only two World Cups. They made their debut in which year, going home without a single goal?
Jesse Marsch had reached a World Cup last 16 before, as a United States assistant under Bob Bradley. At which tournament?
In the Round of 32, four-time winners Germany were paired with which South American side?
Davies' first-ever World Cup goal for Canada against Croatia in 2022 was the fastest of that tournament. How quickly did he score?

sources: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup_knockout_stage (South Africa 0-1 Canada at SoFi Stadium, Inglewood; Eustaquio 90+2; only Round of 32 match on 28 June; 29 June ties Brazil v Japan, Germany v Paraguay, Netherlands v Morocco)

https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-2026-scores-results-schedule-live-updates-round-of-32-173000083.html (Eustaquio stoppage-time winner; Alphonso Davies tournament debut off the bench after group-stage hamstring; Canada reach Round of 16 for first time; face winner of Netherlands v Morocco)

https://www.thenationalnews.com/sport/world-cup-2026/2026/06/29/world-cup-2026-jesse-marsch-gives-us-cold-shoulder-after-canada-seal-last-16-place/ (Jesse Marsch, Canada head coach, seals last-16 place)

https://worldsoccertalk.com/amp/world-cup/you-guys-are-canadian-heroes-jesse-marschs-emotional-speech-after-canadas-historic-world-cup-win-over-south-africa/ (Marsch's post-match speech; historic win over South Africa)

https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49010574/snubbed-us-jesse-marsch-marches-canada-world-cup-mission (Marsch, first American to coach Canada; was USA assistant under Bob Bradley at the 2010 World Cup last 16; first manager to win a knockout game at the 2026 tournament)
https://www.mlssoccer.com/news/alphonso-davies-scores-canada-s-first-world-cup-goal-against-croatia (Davies scores Canada's first-ever World Cup goal, a header, against Croatia in 2022)

https://www.foxsports.com/stories/soccer/canadas-first-ever-world-cup-goal-even-in-blowout-loss-sparks-hope (Davies' goal came after 68 seconds, the fastest of the 2022 World Cup; Canada's first-ever World Cup goal)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup (48-team format; group winners and runners-up plus eight best third-placed teams advance to the Round of 32)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Canada_at_the_FIFA_World_Cup (Canada's debut at the 1986 World Cup, lost all three matches without scoring; previous appearances 1986 and 2022)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup (co-hosts United States, Canada and Mexico; reigning champions Argentina, winners in 2022)
